description: Soft inner-shadow + outer-shadow 'pillow' surfaces on neutral backgrounds. 2020 revival that reads dated in 2026 but still appears in AI output.
avoid_reasoning: `box-shadow: 12px 12px 24px #b0b0b0, -12px -12px 24px #ffffff` on `#e0e0e0` surface. The aesthetic has aged badly and contrast is typically AA-fail without effort.

images.caption: Settings panel with soft-shadow buttons on light gray
Dashboard stat card with inset-shadow treatment
Mobile app UI with pillowy surfaces and no sharp edges
